lens: minimalism (less is more) — judge whether the code does its job with as little code, indirection, and cleverness as possible
note: The labeled held-out set is one JSON object per line at held_out_path: {"input_code": <str>, "gold_band": [lo, hi]}. The harness, driver, scorer, and golden suite all read it verbatim. held_out_path matches judge/code-review/minimalist/metric.json exactly. SWAP held_out.jsonl to plug in more labeled examples; ids are assigned by surviving-line order (CR-001, CR-002, ...).
